user_prompt: X3 mobile game activity background art, 2D semi-painted illustration, vibrant fantasy colors, soft cinematic lighting, clean focal composition, high detail. BRIGHT sunlit shallow-sea diving theme (NOT a dark abyss, NOT lovecraftian, NOT gloomy). Palette: ocean blue, light cyan, teal-green, treasure gold, pearl white, warm sunlight orange. Motifs: light caustics / god-rays, rising bubbles, fish schools, coral, pearls, seashells. HERO SUBJECT: a stylized blue-and-gold mechanical SUBMARINE that matches reference image 2 EXACTLY (shark-fin hull, glowing cyan dome nose, gold bands, red accents). The submarine is the CORE THEME — place it cruising prominently in the UPPER / side area through a bright shallow sea past a half-sunken treasure shipwreck and coral reefs, with sailing-route trails and bubbles. Keep the CENTER of the image calm and open (a fortune wheel will be placed there). Use reference image 1 only for overall framing (ERASE its egyptian theme). ABSOLUTELY NO people, NO characters, NO human figures, NO portrait, NO person of any kind — environment scene ONLY. Output ONLY the painted background scene. NO UI buttons, NO text, NO numbers, NO reward panels, NO progress bars, NO frames, NO watermark.
